originalTitle: I want people to be millionaires — Jim Cramer's blueprint to make money in any market
summary: In this exclusive interview, Jim walks through how investors should think about identifying a small group of individual stocks to complement a diversified portfolio
content: In this exclusive interview, Jim walks through how investors should think about identifying a small group of individual stocks to complement a diversified portfolio
chineseTitle: 我希望人们成为百万富翁——吉姆·克莱默的在任何市场赚钱的蓝图
chineseSummary: 在这次独家采访中，吉姆探讨了投资者应如何考虑确定一小部分个股来补充多元化的投资组合
chineseContent: 在这次独家采访中，吉姆探讨了投资者应如何考虑确定一小部分个股来补充多元化的投资组合
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
